headline: Assessing Celestica (TSX:CLS) Valuation After Strong AI Hardware Momentum
summary: Why Celestica is on investors’ radar Celestica (TSX:CLS) has attracted attention after a period of strong share price moves. This has been supported by its role in supply chain solutions and a rack scale AI hardware collaboration with Advanced Micro Devices on the Helios platform. See our latest analysis for Celestica. Celestica’s recent AI hardware news has emerged against a backdrop of strong momentum, with a 48.27% 1-month share price return contributing to a 32.03% year-to-date share...
